name: Entroly Context Engine
description: Selects and compresses context under budget while preserving protected messages and writing local audit receipts.

pythonCommand.label: Python Command
pythonCommand.help: Python executable where the entroly package is installed.

preserveLastN.label: Recent Messages Preserved
preserveLastN.help: Number of recent messages kept byte-for-byte unchanged.

timeoutMs.label: Bridge Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum time for one Entroly context assembly request.

receiptDir.label: Receipt Directory
receiptDir.help: Optional local directory for Entroly OpenClaw receipts.

writeReceipts.label: Write Local Receipts
writeReceipts.help: Record context hashes, estimated savings, warnings, and decision metadata locally.

distill.label: Distill Older Assistant Messages
distill.help: Remove filler from compressible older assistant responses before budget compression.
